mapper.sql: CASE WHEN os.sync_time IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ei.enroll_in_date IS NULL THEN os.sync_status WHEN CONVERT(DATE, os.sync_time) < CONVERT(DATE, ei.enroll_in_date) THEN 0 ELSE os.sync_status END

FROM ( SELECT employees_id, MAX(sync_date) AS sync_date FROM employee_additions
CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) BETWEEN CONVERT(DATE, #{startDate}) AND CONVERT(DATE, #{endDate})
GROUP BY employees_id ) ea_latest INNER JOIN employee_information ei ON ea_latest.employees_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN ihr_employee_onboarding_status os ON ea_latest.employees_id = os.employees_id
AND ei.staff_name LIKE '%' + #{staffName} + '%'
AND ei.staff_no LIKE '%' + #{staffNo} + '%'
AND = #{syncStatus}
AND ei.staff_no NOT IN
#{sno}
mapper.select:
SELECT ea_latest.employees_id AS employeesId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo, ei.mobile_no AS mobileNo, ei.department_name AS departmentName, ei.enroll_in_date AS enrollInDate, ei.staff_status AS staffStatus, AS syncStatus, os.sync_time AS syncTime, os.error_message AS errorMessage
ORDER BY ei.enroll_in_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: MERGE ihr_employee_onboarding_status AS target USING (SELECT #{entity.employeesId} AS employees_id) AS source ON target.employees_id = source.employees_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET staff_name = #{entity.staffName}, staff_no = #{entity.staffNo}, sync_status = #{entity.syncStatus}, sync_time = #{entity.syncTime}, error_message = #{entity.errorMessage}, update_time = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (employees_id, staff_name, staff_no, sync_status, sync_time, error_message, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{entity.employeesId}, #{entity.staffName}, #{entity.staffNo}, #{entity.syncStatus}, #{entity.syncTime}, #{entity.errorMessage}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
mapper.select: SELECT sync_status FROM ihr_employee_onboarding_status WHERE employees_id = #{employeesId}
